rationale: The citing paper’s core method is an integrated CTM-HMM on search-query text for path-to-purchase inference, while the cited paper focuses on mining online reviews for attribute-based market-structure analysis, so the overlap appears thematic (marketing text analytics) rather than obviously direct.
